text: I would like to live in Singapore because it is very convenient and safe.
Um the transport system is efficient, and people can travel across the city without spending too much time.
Although the cost of living is high, I think the career opportunities are excellent for young professionals.
I also like the multicultural environment, which makes daily life more interesting and helps people understand different cultures.
In the future I hope to study data and artificial intelligence there, so living in that city would support both my education and my career.
